domain_expertise.evidence: Principal Solution Architecture role leading enterprise AI adoption at Lyzr and prior strategy roles at Teradata/SAP.
Delivered agentic AI solutions for major firms including BMO, Willis Towers Watson, and Accenture.
Extensive tenure at Warner Home Video, Screen Engine, and OTX in box office/consumer behavior forecasting.
Product Leadership at Viant and Nativo, focusing on Identity Resolution and DMP systems.
Architecting analytics platforms on AWS and SAP HANA during Teradata and SAP tenures.

soft_skills_signals.justification: Self-described as a 'trusted advisor in client engagements—leading executive workshops.'
Endorsed for building a 'massive repository of Agentic AI use cases' that served as a 'primary sales engine'.
Cited by a colleague for having a 'functional, high-quality demo ready by the afternoon' for complex use cases.
Praised for ability to 'quickly understand complex customer contexts, connect the right stakeholders, and remove friction'.
Experience describes leading 'cross-functional collaboration between product, engineering, and sales leadership'.

data.skill_progression_narrative: Jeremy evolved from a focus on traditional market research and statistical modeling for the media industry to a cloud-native architecture expert at global tech firms like SAP and Teradata. He has now successfully transitioned into an AI Product Leader, specializing in the development of agentic AI frameworks and autonomous enterprise workflows.
